title: CRH Appoints Aylwyn Bryan as CFO
content:
NEW YORK – May 13, 2026 – CRH (NYSE: CRH), the leading provider of building materials, announced the appointment of Aylwyn Bryan as its Chief Financial Officer, effective May 12, 2026. Bryan has over 25 years of financial leadership experience, including the past 14 years with CRH. Most recently he served as CFO of CRH’s […]

title: Seth Ring elevated to president and COO at Toll Brothers
content: Toll Brothers has promoted Executive Vice President Seth J. Ring to president and chief operating officer, succeeding outgoing president and COO Robert (Rob) Parahus, according to a company announcement. Ring, a 22-year Toll Brothers veteran, will also join the company’s board of directors. Parahus, who has been with Toll for 40 years, will retire from […]
